best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-profilemanagement-001 title: profile management - correctly filled fields module: profilemanagement source pages: 5 preconditions: user is logged in test data: - name: john doe - email: johndoe@example.com - phone: 1234567890 - address: 123 main st test steps: 1. click "profile" in the side menu 2. save changes 3. verify the fields are correctly filled 4. proceed to the accommodations screen 5. verify the fields are correctly filled again expected result: the user should be able to save the profile with correctly filled fields.

item_text: the flow starts at the profile screen, proceeds to the accommodation screen, and then checks if the fields are correctly filled.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-profilemanagement-001 title: profile management - correctly filled fields module: profilemanagement source pages: 5 preconditions: user is logged in test data: - name: john doe - email: johndoe@example.com - phone: 1234567890 - address: 123 main st test steps: 1. click "profile" in the side menu 2. save changes 3. verify the fields are correctly filled 4. proceed to the accommodations screen 5. verify the fields are correctly filled again expected result: the user should be able to save the profile with correctly filled fields.

item_text: if the fields are not correctly filled, the user is prompted to correct them, and the process loops back to the validation step.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-profilemanagement-004 title: profile management - loop correction module: profilemanagement source pages: 5 preconditions: user is logged in test data: - name: john doe - email: johndoe@example.com - phone: - address: 123 main st test steps: 1. click "profile" in the side menu 2. save changes 3. verify the fields are not correctly filled 4. prompt to correct the data 5. correct the data and save again 6. verify the fields are correctly filled expected result: the user should be able to loop through the correction process until the fields are correctly filled.

item_text: if the fields are correctly filled, the user can save or discard the changes, returning to the profile screen.
